opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: This pain hit my back like a sledgehammer and shoots right down into my groin, I can't find a single comfortable position!
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain came on suddenly about two hours ago and it's unbearable — I've been pacing and I've thrown up a few times, and a painkiller I took earlier did nothing.

symptom_narrative.onset: sudden — about two hours ago, came on out of nowhere
symptom_narrative.duration: two hours and not letting up
symptom_narrative.character: sharp, stabbing, comes in waves like a cramp that grips and eases
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain of my life, easily a 10 out of 10 at its peak
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: starts in my right side and back, then shoots down into my groin and testicle
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes in waves — peaks then eases a little, then peaks again
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing helps — I can't lie still, so I keep pacing and shifting position
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps hitting me in waves no matter what I do
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling really sick, I've vomited three times, sweaty and pale during the worst spikes, and it stings when I wee with a strong urge to go
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't sit, can't lie down, can't do anything — just pacing and groaning

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took some tablets about an hour ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: supportive partner is at home and present during the call

objective_data_offered.value: my last wee was pink-tinged, like there was a bit of blood in it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's visual impression of their own urine; not dipstick- or lab-confirmed

objective_data_offered.value: cannot stay still — pacing, sitting then standing, writhing; groaning with the pain spikes
looks pale and sweaty during the worst of the pain
vomited three times since it started
